---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Description
<!-- Clear and concise description of what you want to happen -->

## Problem Statement
<!-- Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe the problem -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe the solution you'd like -->

## Alternative Solutions
<!-- Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered -->

## Use Cases
<!-- Describe real-world use cases for this feature -->

1. User scenario 1
2. User scenario 2

## Mock-ups or Examples
<!-- If applicable, add screenshots or examples -->

## Related Issues
<!-- Link to related issues or PRs -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context about the feature request -->

## Priority
<!-- Select the priority level -->

- [ ] Low - Nice to have
- [ ] Medium - Should have
- [ ] High - Must have

## Estimated Effort
<!-- Estimate the effort required -->

- [ ] Small (< 1 day)
- [ ] Medium (1-3 days)
- [ ] Large (> 3 days)
- [ ] Unknown

## Implementation Details
<!-- Any implementation details or technical considerations -->

## Documentation Needed
<!-- What documentation would be needed for this feature -->

- [ ] README update
- [ ] API documentation
- [ ] User guide
- [ ] Developer guide
